headline: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. Announces Webcast of Presentation at the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference
summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio, May 01, 2026--Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD) today announced it will present at the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (PT). A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the Company’s investor relations website at investor.mt.com.
